title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeExec: Assertion `pIn1!=pIn3' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 INTEGER, CHECK(c2 IS NOT NULL AND c3 IN (SELECT c1 FROM t1)));
UPDATE t2 SET c3 = (SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE c1 = 1);
key_bug_features: UPDATE triggers an assertion error with CHECK constraint
